DocChat Sample Document

This document describes the DocChat application, which allows users to upload documents and ask questions about their content using AI.

Key Features:
- Document upload supporting PDF, DOCX, and TXT formats
- AI-powered question answering with source citations
- Chat history that persists across sessions
- Free tier with 3 documents and 20 questions per day
- Pro tier at $9/month with unlimited documents and questions

The application uses Next.js for the frontend, Supabase for authentication and storage, and OpenAI for natural language processing.

Users can drag and drop files or click to upload. Once a document is processed, they can ask questions in a conversational interface. The AI will respond with relevant information extracted from the document, including citations pointing to the specific sections used.
